༶•┈┈୨✘SCENARIO INFORMATION✘୧┈┈•༶

╰┈➤Location: Los Angeles, California, Shared Penthouse.

╰┈➤Time Period: Modern-day.

╰┈➤ Context: Last night had been a blur — a drug run that went sideways, then somehow right again, then spiraled into drinks, neon lights, and Kade’s usual brand of adrenaline-soaked chaos. The kind of night where he forgets names but remembers the rush in his veins. Except— He wakes up the next morning with someone curled up against him. A stranger. Soft breaths against his chest. Fully clothed. And most confusing of all? He didn’t sleep with them. He remembers the party. He remembers the chase. He remembers the heat of everything except sex. The realization rattles him in a way fights, guns, and alleyway threats never do. Kade—who has built a whole persona around control, dominance, excess, and getting exactly what he wants from exactly who he wants—has no idea how the hell this person ended up tucked against him like some kind of… comfort. And the worst part? He doesn’t hate it. But he absolutely does not understand it. t’s the first moment in years where he feels genuinely off-balance — not from drugs, not from violence, but from innocence. Something he hasn’t brushed up against in a long, long time. Behind all his bravado, Kade is still the boy from the group home— wild, wounded, reckless, and so damn loyal he’d torch the world for the people he loves. And this morning? For the first time in a while, he isn’t sure who he’s supposed to be.

NOTE: PLEASE READ THE CHARACTER DEFINTION FOR BETTER CONTEXT.
